title: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on a baroque works pair attacks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks. Nami turns fear into strategy and starts using the Clima-Tact to survive Miss Doublefinger. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: What's wrong? If you change into Nami now,

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I won't be able to finish you off...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I can't even move anymore... what good would come from cowardly avoiding my fate...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm already hated to be rubbed out by my organi- zation...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: What're you just standin' around for!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I SAID FINISH ME OFF ALREADY!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: Proof of camaraderie born between rivals...! I...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: See ya. I'm takin' back these goggles...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: GAHH! So he did finish me off!

summary: This part develops a baroque works pair attacks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
